title: Apple Glasses 2026: AR/VR Smart Glasses, Features, Release Date, and What to Expect
content: Current reports from Bloomberg and analyst Ming-Chi Kuo indicate an Apple Glasses 2026 announcement, with mass production beginning in late 2025 and sales likely starting in early 2027 under a codename like N50.
